Home / Shop / Varsity Locker

Varsity

Varsity Locker

Model # VAR-24-FM

Lead time: quick ship in one month (24" width, one signature color) · Custom-built in three months

$449.00
19" (standard)
24" (standard)
Fusion Maple
Select add-ons to update price

Volume Discounts

Quantity Price
50 + lockers 3–5% discount – Contact us for pricing

Varsity Wood Locker – Features & Options

Specifications

Standard dimensions 24" W × 76" H × 19" D
Base Optional 4" high base
Frame 3/4"
Backing 3/4"
Weight Approx. 75 lbs
Construction 3/4" cabinetry grade maple plywood, premium finish
Edgebanding PVC edgebanding
Width range 18" – 32"
Depth 19" (standard)
Finish Fusion Maple
Quick ship 2–4 weeks (24" or 32" width)
Custom build 8–12 weeks — any size, options
Warranty 5 year warranty

Features

  • Made from 3/4" cabinetry grade maple plywood
  • Modular design for easy repair or replacement of components
  • 14" high foot locker provides comfortable seating and secure equipment storage
  • Available in 18" to 32" widths; standard configuration 24" W x 76" H x 19" D with optional 4" base
  • 5 year warranty

Options

  • Available in Fusion Maple finish
  • Secure lock box integrated into the upper compartment
  • Bottom cushion for added seating comfort
  • Skate hooks for hockey or figure skating storage
  • Custom logo option for teams or programs (custom orders only)
  • Name plate and additional gear hooks

LOCKER ACCESSORIES

Colors available (PDF)
